messages.content:
I am writing a program in C# using Visual Studio 2017 and .Net Framework 4.6.2.
I have detected a DOS console window Title, ID, and Handle.
I need to write a command on that window and then hit the enter key.
Can you help me with that code?
SendKeysToConsole just writes a strange string: ^Z^Zeyu
GetStdHandle no existe en el contexyo actual
It detects the right window, but streamWriter.WriteLine(commandToWrite); doesn't write anything
same result. the wintow remains intact. I verified the execution of the code and it certainly is sending the right message. But the object window seems to be read only ort is not receiving the string
